KmaApiHubUrlOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub non-structured URL operation.
KmaApiHubUrlOutput.title: KmaApiHubUrlOutput

anal_time.description: KMA analyzed weather-chart time in UTC, YYYYMMDDHHMM. Include minutes; do not pass a 10-digit KST hour. For now/today requests, use the latest completed official UTC analysis slot before the citizen's local time. Official parameter name: analTime. Operation: analysis_weather_chart_image.
anal_time.title: Anal Time

group_name.description: KMA APIHub URL request parameter groupName. Official parameter name: groupName. Operation: analysis_weather_chart_image.
group_name.title: Group Name

image_type.description: KMA APIHub URL request parameter imageType. Official parameter name: imageType. Operation: analysis_weather_chart_image.
image_type.title: Image Type

is_typ.description: KMA APIHub URL request parameter isTyp. Official parameter name: isTyp. Operation: analysis_weather_chart_image.
is_typ.title: Is Typ

meta.description: KMA APIHub URL request parameter meta. Official parameter name: meta. Operation: analysis_weather_chart_image.
meta.title: Meta
